626299406562.customer_conversation: I am the chief calling from the ABC organization. I have been trying to sign into my computer for the last 30 minutes, and I'm stuck at the welcome screen. I did a hard shutdown, and I'm still unable to sign in. Can you check if you see anything on your end regarding this? Initially, I saw a blue screen saying "Recovery, Windows didn't load correctly," along with options to repair or restart the PC. We’ve been stuck at the welcome screen for quite some time now and I’m unsure what to do next. Should I attempt another hard restart by pressing the power button for the second time? Oh, wait, as soon as I did that, my screen changed. It didn't reboot, but it brought me to my desktop. Should I perform a regular restart since I'm on my desktop now? Currently, it just says "please wait" with the spinning circle, indicating it’s still processing. Before this, it displayed a different message but I can't recall it exactly. It has been standing still on the "please wait" screen. I don't remember exactly when my last updates were, but I did try restarting after seeing that blue screen. I think the last one I clearly noticed was earlier this week but that doesn't help much now. Thank you for your assistance today; it's been quite a long wait. To be fair, I wasn't the only one facing issues. I received a text from my CFO stating she's also unable to sign in. I even reached out to her to check if she had any insights about the issue. She mentioned one other colleague, Sarah, is also unable to log in. Glad to see that mine is up and running now, but it raises the question about what caused the issue in the first place, whether it was triggered from your side or just a random glitch. Several of them have reported similar problems at the same time and since our office is located in different places, it seems the issue may be somewhat widespread. I'll check with my colleagues to see if they're experiencing the same. While I'm out, would it be okay if I lock my screen? Thank you for your support. I have a meeting soon, so I hope all will be resolved by then. I also talked to Kristen who said she experienced some delay, but it was not too significant. She mentioned it took around 10-15 minutes for her login. I also checked with another co-worker, Matt. He didn’t face any issues with logging in today, but he reported his system was powered on already. I’ll continue following up with others as well to see how they're doing. I must say, our CFO mentioned that several more people, Becky and Linnea, are also having login troubles. It would be beneficial if they start calling in so the support team can address these concerns effectively. So it appears we aren't alone with these issues; others may need your help too. I appreciate you staying engaged with us regarding these potential updates as well. Hopefully, we can resolve this ahead of time for everyone getting back to their routines. Thank you so much for your time and help today! I look forward to the follow-up and hopefully, we can smooth out these technical hiccups ahead.
